generated_oml:
{
  namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/DTDFVocab#"
  namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"

instance InsulatedContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container (polystyrene, air volume ~0.03 m³)"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) acting as primary heat source, controlled via MOSFETs driven by Raspberry Pi GPIO through optocouplers"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan for air circulation (airflow ~0.02 m³/s), operating at 12V/24V"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller with GPIO, Wi-Fi, and Bluetooth"
]

instance ControlPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for electrical isolation of high-current components"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for heatbed and fan"
]

instance ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for external room temperature, measuring from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalRoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal box temperature 1, measuring from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalBoxTemperature1DataTransmitted
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal box temperature 2, measuring from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalBoxTemperature2DataTransmitted
]

instance PowerSupplyVoltageCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring power supply voltage and current for heatbed circuit",
    DTDFVocab:producedData PowerSupplyVoltageCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalRoomTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalBoxTemperature1DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1
]

instance InternalBoxTemperature2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2
]

instance PowerSupplyVoltageCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PowerSupplyVoltageCurrentSensor
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker (v3.x) for handling data transmission between physical sensors and virtual components",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance RaspberryPi4Platform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware platform with GPIO, Wi-Fi, and Bluetooth capabilities",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance PythonScipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python with Scipy optimization library for data processing and model calibration",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService, TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance PCBDesignTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design tools for MOSFET and optocoupler circuitry"
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source GitHub repository for code and specifications",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance GPIOControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for GPIO control signals to heatbed and fan via MOSFETs and optocouplers",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance OverheatingSafetyCheck : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety check to prevent overheating of the incubator system"
]

instance ThermalRegulationOptimization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization of thermal regulation parameters for efficient temperature control"
]

instance PredictedTemperature : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature from thermal model simulations"
]

instance HeatbedActivationDurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Decision to activate the heatbed for a specific duration H in bang-bang control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance WaitDurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Decision to wait for a specific duration C before re-activating the heatbed in bang-bang control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateModelParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to update thermal model parameters using non-linear least squares optimization",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based temperature prediction using calibrated thermal models (Model A and Model B)",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedTemperature
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety checks and thermal regulation optimization",
    DTDFVocab:provides OverheatingSafetyCheck, ThermalRegulationOptimization, HeatbedActivationDurationAction, WaitDurationAction
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration of model parameters via non-linear least squares optimization",
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateModelParameters
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalRoomTemperatureDataTransmitted, InternalBoxTemperature1DataTransmitted, InternalBoxTemperature2DataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, PythonScipy
]

instance PowerSupplyVoltageCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Power supply voltage and current measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData PowerSupplyVoltageCurrentDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, PythonScipy
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 2 parameters: C_air, G_box assumes uniform temperature and no heatbed thermal inertia",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 4 parameters: C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box accounts for heatbed thermal storage",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container (polystyrene, air volume ~0.03 m³) thermal incubator system",
    base:contains InsulatedContainer, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPi4, ControlPCB, PowerSupply, ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor, InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1, InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2, PowerSupplyVoltageCurrentSensor
]
}
